scripts.install-cli: pnpm run build:cli && rm -rf ~/.local/bin/bmo-tools && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin/bmo-tools && cp dist/bmo ~/.local/bin/bmo && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/bmo && if command -v codesign >/dev/null 2>&1; then codesign --force --sign - ~/.local/bin/bmo; fi && cp -r tools/* ~/.local/bin/bmo-tools/ && echo 'Installed bmo to ~/.local/bin/bmo (tools in ~/.local/bin/bmo-tools/)'
